name: pymatgen
tagline: Wraps the pymatgen library and Materials Project API for crystal structures, phase diagrams, and electronic-structure analysis.
verdict: Clean, on-topic scientific toolkit skill. MP_API_KEY handling is declared transparently in frontmatter and only used against the official Materials Project API (next-gen.materialsproject.org) — no exfiltration, no shell-piping, no hidden instructions. Minor hygiene gaps only: file runs 690 lines (~38% over the ~500-line budget) and gives no explicit 'do not

highlights.summary: No explicit negative-trigger section ('do NOT use for...') is present anywhere in the file, leaving edge cases (e.g. non-materials chemistry, MD simulations) unaddressed.

No explicit 'output contract' section defining expected return format; output shape is implied only by scattered code snippets (print statements, file writes), which is workable for a library-referenc
File is 690 lines total, roughly 38% over the ~500-line size budget, though the overage is legitimate technical content rather than bloat.
